extracted.title: ETNG Action Alert -- EFF 4/3
extracted.description:
In order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, ETNG is issuing an Action Alert pursuant to Section 14.6 of the General Terms and Conditions of ETNG's FERC Gas Tariff effective 9:00 AM CCT, April 3, 2026 for all LMSMA and LMSPA parties.

This Action Alert does not affect the ability of ETNG to receive or deliver quantities of gas for scheduled nominations to any customer, storage field, or pipeline.

During the effectiveness of this Action Alert, balancing parties under Rate Schedules LMSMA and LMSPA must be balanced such that actual deliveries of gas out of the system must be equal to or greater than scheduled deliveries out of the system and actual receipts of gas into the system must be equal to or less than scheduled receipts into the system.

The penalty provisions under Section 47.5(b) of the General Terms and Conditions of ETNG's FERC Gas Tariff shall apply for failure to conform for each dekatherm of actual receipt quantities that are greater than scheduled receipt quantities and for each dekatherm of actual delivery quantities that are less than scheduled delivery quantities, in each case with a tolerance of 5% of scheduled quantities or 250 dekatherms (whichever is greater).

The penalty will be subject to $0.98 plus an index price based on the arithmetic average of the High Common prices published in Gas Daily's "Daily Price Survey" for "Transco, zone 5 del." and "Tennessee, 500 Leg" for the day the violation occurred for each Dekatherm of gas by which it deviated from the requirements of the Action Alert. In addition, ETNG will not permit retroactive nominations to avoid an Action Alert penalty.

This Action Alert will remain in effect until 9:00 AM CCT, April 7, 2026.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.

Please refer to the table below for the effected ETNG operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages.

Operational Areas / Gas Day April 1 - April 2: System Wide - No OFO/No Action Alert
Operational Areas / Gas Day April 3 - April 6: System Wide - Action Alert in Effect: No Due Pipe Action Alert 5% / 250
Operational Areas / Gas Day April 7 and until further notice: System Wide - No OFO/No Action Alert

NOTE:
Deliveries No DP: Shippers are not to take more than scheduled
Deliveries No DS: Shippers are not to take less than scheduled
Receipts No DP: Shippers are not to give less than scheduled
Receipts No DS: Shippers are not to give more than scheduled
